subject: [PATCH v2 04/21] fuse: implement passthrough for readdir

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch implements passthrough for readdir operations in the FUSE file system. It allows a directory to be opened with both cached readdir and readdir passthrough enabled, but not at the same time as regular files. The opt-in for passthrough of READDIR operation means that there is no READDIRPLUS call to the server. This patch also includes changes to ensure that directories opened without both FOPEN_CACHE_DIR and FOPEN_PASSTHROUGH flags are marked as FOPEN_DIRECT_IO, which does not affect io mode.
